chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-2281 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For hearing of CMA No.8863/2025 2. For hearing of CMA No.1058/2022 21.08.2025 Mr. Abdul Rauf, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Sadaruddin, advocate for the respondent - Sindh Small Industries Corporation Mr. Sandeep Malani, AAG --------- Compliance report dated 18.4.2022 indicates that substantial compliance has been made vide order dated 02.12.2021. Furthermore, learned counsel for respondent – Sindh Small Industries Corporation (`SSIC`), states that no officer has been appointed on OPS/acting charge basis. Based on compliance report and statement of learned counsel for the respondent- SSIC, both the contempt applications are disposed of. A copy of this order shall be sent to the Chief Secretary, Sindh, for information and compliance. Head of Const. Benches JUDGE Nadir*
